ab: Hmuwa mesa meyah hini.
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: Mnkesa ku meyah hini.
en: I came on foot.

ab: Pnuapa su rulu maanu meyah.
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: Tnuapa ku basu meyah.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: Mhuwa su mesa musa kyokay?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: Paanun ku rulu tama msuupu musa.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: huwa mesa musa sapah pyasan klaali?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: Taapa ceyun ka heya musa sapah pyasan.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: Huwa mesa musa maruy damac ka payi su?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: Taapa otobay musa maruy damac ka heya.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: Huwa su mesa musa ranyi?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: Taapa ku asu musa ranyi.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: Huwa mesa musa ranyi ka heya?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: Maha taapa asu skiya musa ranyi ka heya.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: Taapa maanu musa Kawsyong ka heya?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: Taapa Kawte musa kawsyong ka heya.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: Tnaapa rulu qrengun musa Taytong ka heya?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Un, tnaapa rulu qrengun musa Taytong ka heya.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: Tnaapa rulu qrengun musa Taytong ka heya?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Uxe, tnaapa asu skiya musa Taytong ka heya.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: Niqan twasun basu ka hini?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: Niqan, qtaun su twasun basu mquri su daya.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: Gaga inu daling hari Ceyun peeyah hini?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: Uka sngayan ceyun ka hini, asi su ka taapa haya.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: knhenu bsiyaq taapa basu musa sapah pyasan?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: 15 qnedis patis hido pdehuk sapah pyasan.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: Knhenu bsiyaq taapa Kawte pdehuk musa Taycong?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: 1 patis hido pdehuk Taycong.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: Ye maha bsiyaq mgeriq rulu musa Uray?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: Yani ba maha 1 patis hido.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: Knhenu bsiyaq taapa su Ceyun meyah sapah mu?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: Yani maha 20 bbaro patis hido.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: Mkela su taapa jidensya?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: Mkela ku taapa jidensya.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: Niqan otobay su?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: Niqan ku 1 otobay.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: Niqan otobay su?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: Uka ku ototbay.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
